source: Adapted from W3C web-platform-tests (html/dom/canvas) + MDN reference

tests.description: fillRect draws a filled rectangle at the specified coordinates
tests.script: var c = document.createElement('canvas'); var ctx = c.getContext('2d'); ctx.fillStyle = '#ff0000'; ctx.fillRect(10, 10, 50, 50);
var c = document.createElement('canvas'); var ctx = c.getContext('2d'); ctx.strokeStyle = '#0000ff'; ctx.strokeRect(10, 10, 50, 50);

tests.description: clearRect clears a rectangular region to transparent
tests.script: var c = document.createElement('canvas'); var ctx = c.getContext('2d'); ctx.fillStyle = '#ff0000'; ctx.fillRect(0, 0, 100, 100); ctx.clearRect(10, 10, 50, 50);
var c = document.createElement('canvas'); var ctx = c.getContext('2d'); ctx.fillStyle = '#00ff00'; ctx.fillRect(0, 0, 50, 50);

tests.description: fillStyle accepts named CSS colors (red, blue, etc.)
tests.script: var c = document.createElement('canvas'); var ctx = c.getContext('2d'); ctx.fillStyle = 'red'; ctx.fillRect(0, 0, 50, 50);

tests.description: beginPath + moveTo + lineTo + closePath + fill draws a filled polygon
tests.script: var c = document.createElement('canvas'); var ctx = c.getContext('2d'); ctx.fillStyle = '#ff0000'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(10, 10); ctx.lineTo(60, 10); ctx.lineTo(35, 60); ctx.closePath(); ctx.fill();

tests.description: translate shifts the origin before drawing
tests.script: var c = document.createElement('canvas'); var ctx = c.getContext('2d'); ctx.translate(20, 20); ctx.fillStyle = '#ff0000'; ctx.fillRect(0, 0, 50, 50);
var c = document.createElement('canvas'); var ctx = c.getContext('2d'); ctx.scale(2, 2); ctx.fillStyle = '#ff0000'; ctx.fillRect(10, 10, 25, 25);

tests.description: save/restore preserves and restores the transform state
tests.script: var c = document.createElement('canvas'); var ctx = c.getContext('2d'); ctx.save(); ctx.translate(50, 50); ctx.fillStyle = '#ff0000'; ctx.fillRect(0, 0, 20, 20); ctx.restore(); ctx.fillStyle = '#0000ff'; ctx.fillRect(0, 0, 20, 20);

tests.description: Multiple fillRect calls with different colors accumulate in the scene
tests.script: var c = document.createElement('canvas'); var ctx = c.getContext('2d'); ctx.fillStyle = '#ff0000'; ctx.fillRect(0, 0, 30, 30); ctx.fillStyle = '#00ff00'; ctx.fillRect(30, 30, 30, 30);
